title: Create ChatService for API integration
description:
## Summary
Create Angular service to communicate with chat backend APIs.

## Spec Reference
@spec: messaging-system-frontend_spec.md
@covers AC-FE-MSG-001, AC-FE-MSG-002, AC-FE-MSG-003, AC-FE-MSG-004

## Methods
- getRooms(hubId?, filters?): Signal<ChatRoom[]>
- getMessages(roomId, page): Signal<ChatMessage[]>
- sendMessage(roomId, message, files?): Promise<ChatMessage>
- markAsRead(roomId): Promise<void>

## Files to Create
- projects/app/src/app/core/services/chat.service.ts
- projects/app/src/app/core/models/chat.model.ts

title: Refactor Hub Chat to use real APIs
description:

- Connect WebSocket for real-time
